queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the statistical impact of having no checking account on credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings at least 1000 DM.
queries.question: Determinants of credit risk reduction associated with maintaining savings account balances of at least 1000 DM.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: all previous credits at this bank paid back duly.
queries.question: Investigation into the contribution of a credit history where all previous credits were paid back duly to elevated credit risk.
